provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Building Societies Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires, " Act " means the Building Societies Act 1 . 1 Cap. 87

provisions.title: Forms
provisions.content: The forms in the First Schedule hereto shall be used in all matters to which they refer, or are capable for being applied or adapted, with such alterations and additions, if any, as are necessary or desirable and the Registrar allows.

provisions.title: Documents to be written legibly in English upon good paper
provisions.content: All applications, returns, notices and other documents required sent to the Registrar shall be clearly and legibly written, printed or type-written in the English language upon paper of durable quality.

provisions.title: Signature of applications for registrations
provisions.content: (1) Every application for the registration of a building society under section 7 of the Act shall be signed by seven or more of the persons who were present at the general meeting at which the rules of the proposed society were adopted, who shall also sign the copies of the rules accompanying the application. (2) Every application for the registration of a building society under section 69 of the Act shall be signed by a director or member of the committee of management or secretary of the society, who shall also sign the documents required to accompany the application.

provisions.title: Special provisions relating to annual accounts of societies carrying on business abroad
provisions.content: (1) Where a building society incorporated under the provisions of the Act carries on business outside Tanzania every annual account and statement of the society prepared under the provisions of section 30 of the Act shall contain, in addition to the particulars required by Form BS6 in the First Schedule hereto, a summary showing the balances under each of the seven accounts therein contained attributable to its business in each country, district or place outside Tanzania, in which the society carries on business, such balances to be shown in the currency of the country, district or place to which they refer. (2) Every annual account and statement prepared by a building society incorporates outside Tanzania and registered under the provisions of the Act shall contain, in addition to the particulars required by Form BS6 in the First Schedule hereto, a summary showing the balances under each of the seven accounts therein contained attributable to its business in the Tanzania, such balances to be shown in the currency of the country, district or place to which they refer.

provisions.title: Certification of copies of resolutions
provisions.content: Any copy of the rules of a building society or of a resolution adopted by a building society requiring to be certified and sent to the Registrar shall be certified as a true copy of the original by a director or member of the committee of management or by the secretary of the society.

provisions.title: Fees
provisions.content: The fees set out in the third column of the Second Schedule hereto shall be charged for the several matters set out opposite thereto in the second column of that Schedule. First Schedule Forms [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced.] Second Schedule Fees Item No. Matter Fee Shs. Cts. 1. On application for registration under section 7 or section 69 200 00 2. For filing an annual statement and account, a return of sales and transfers, a notice of union, a notice of transfer of engagements or any certified copy of a resolution 40 00 3. For filing a notice of change of address or a notice of change of directors 10 00 4. On application for confirmation of a union or transfer of engagement under section 51 100 00 5. On reference of a dispute to the Registrar 100 00 6. On application for the appointment of a person to inspect the books of a building society under section 58 or the appointment of an inspector or the calling of a meeting under section 59 100 00 7. For registering a notice of termination or commencement or completion of dissolution or winding-up under section 62 10 00 8. For registering an instrument of dissolution or an instrument varying the provisions of an instrument of resolution under section 63 100 00 9. For filing an account and balance sheet on dissolution under section 67 10 00 00 10. On application for an award for dissolution under section 100 00 11. For inspection of the documents in the custody of the Registrar relating to any one building society 10 00 12.
